title: Growth Manager
location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India / Gurgaon, Haryana, India
role_summary: Drive digital advertising growth by working with advertisers and businesses to expand Google's ads ecosystem in India, combining consultative sales with business development.
why_good_fit: Your deep experience activating Indian SMBs as advertisers at Meta (contributing to the 2.3% India revenue uplift), your understanding of the Indian advertiser journey from informal businesses to paying advertisers, and your Shoppertainment monetisation work directly align with this growth mandate. Your on-ground understanding of Tier 2/3 business behaviour is a rare differentiator.
how_to_win: Lead with your story of converting active Indian businesses into paying advertisers at Meta — the bakery-to-10M-businesses arc. Emphasize your ability to bridge the gap between global ad products and Indian market realities. Prepare a POV on how Google Ads can better serve India's informal SMB segment. Be ready to discuss your competitive intelligence work (TikTok re-entry) as evidence of strategic thinking in the ads/growth space.
key_requirements: 5+ years in digital advertising, consultative sales, business development, or digital marketing. Bachelor's degree.

title: Strategy and Operations Lead, GBO Tools
role_summary: Lead strategy and operations for Google Business Operations tools, combining management consulting-style strategic thinking with program management to drive operational excellence.
why_good_fit: Your strategic planning experience (Half Planning at Meta, competitive strategy for TikTok re-entry), cross-functional program execution, and ability to synthesize insights into actionable strategies provide relevant foundations. Your personal AI operating system (80% task automation) demonstrates operational excellence thinking. However, this role leans more toward traditional strategy/ops consulting than your core product growth strengths.
how_to_win: Frame your Meta work methodology (Half Planning → Discovery → Insight → Pitching → Execution) as a structured strategy and operations framework. Highlight the TikTok re-entry competitive strategy as a consulting-style strategic deliverable that influenced CPO-level decisions. Emphasize your AI-driven operational efficiency (Metamate OS). Be honest that your background is product-first but argue that product strategy IS business strategy in tech companies.
key_requirements: 6+ years in management consulting, business strategy, corporate advisory, or program management. Bachelor's degree.

title: Product Marketing Manager, Google Search
role_summary: Lead product marketing strategy for Google Search in India, managing cross-functional projects across growth, product marketing, and brand marketing to drive user engagement and adoption.
why_good_fit: Your 7+ years of product growth work at Meta and ByteDance, deep Indian market intelligence, cross-functional collaboration across product/marketing/engineering teams, and experience building strategic narratives (country context docs, competitive intelligence) map well to a product marketing role. Your GenZ Product Council membership and AI user research give you unique insight into how Indian users interact with Search and AI-powered search experiences.
how_to_win: Position yourself as a product-marketing hybrid — someone who doesn't just market products but shapes them based on deep user understanding. Lead with your MetaAI India field work (20+ user interviews, the 'language as growth lever' insight) as an example of how you generate marketing-relevant product insights. Prepare a brief on how Google Search's AI features (AI Overviews, Gemini integration) could be better positioned for Indian GenZ and vernacular users.
key_requirements: 6+ years marketing experience across growth/product marketing/brand. Cross-functional project management. Bachelor's degree.

title: Product Manager, Google Pay
role_summary: Own product strategy and execution for Google Pay in India, driving user growth, engagement, and payments innovation in one of the world's largest digital payments markets.
why_good_fit: Your 7+ years of product experience spanning zero-to-one building (Resso founding team), monetisation strategy (Shoppertainment, SMB advertiser conversion), and deep Indian market intelligence make you a strong candidate. Your SMB work at Meta — understanding how Indian informal businesses transact via WhatsApp and voice-led operations — directly translates to Google Pay's merchant and SMB payments opportunity. Your experience taking insights from field observation to product execution (bakery → 10M businesses) demonstrates the exact product sense needed.
how_to_win: Lead with your end-to-end product impact story: bakery observation → data analysis → policy change → agentic resolution system → 2.3% revenue uplift. Frame your understanding of Indian SMB payment behaviour as a unique asset — how informal businesses actually handle money vs. how fintech products assume they do. Prepare a product teardown of Google Pay's merchant experience with specific improvement hypotheses rooted in your on-ground SMB research. Address the payments domain gap proactively by highlighting your fast learning curve (Resso: music streaming novice → founding team member).
key_requirements: 5+ years product management experience. Bachelor's degree.

title: Product Manager, Payments Platform
location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India / Hyderabad, Telangana, India
role_summary: Drive product strategy and execution for Google's payments platform infrastructure, building scalable payment solutions that power Google Pay and other Google products.
why_good_fit: Your product management experience across Meta and ByteDance (7+ years), zero-to-one building experience (Resso founding team, travel startup), and cross-functional execution partnership with engineering teams position you well. Your work on Meta's WhatsApp Paid Messaging and SMB monetisation products demonstrates experience in payments-adjacent product surfaces. Your ability to translate complex user needs into product requirements (SMB enforcement → agentic resolution system) shows the systems-thinking needed for platform roles.
how_to_win: Emphasize your platform-level thinking: how your SMB enforcement work required understanding the full system (enforcement models, appeal flows, resolution systems) and building a new product layer. Highlight your cross-functional leadership across engineering, policy, and data teams. Prepare to discuss how you'd approach building for India's unique payments infrastructure (UPI, regulatory complexity). Be transparent about payments domain being new but frame your rapid domain mastery at ByteDance (music streaming) and Meta (enforcement, AI) as evidence of fast learning.
key_requirements: 5+ years product management experience. Bachelor's degree.

title: Product Manager, Payments Risk
role_summary: Own the product strategy for payments risk management at Google, building systems to detect, prevent, and mitigate fraud and abuse across Google's payment products from conception to launch.
why_good_fit: Your SMB over-enforcement work at Meta is a direct parallel — you identified false positives in enforcement systems, mapped the user impact, influenced policy changes, and drove the creation of an agentic resolution system. This is fundamentally risk/enforcement product work. Your experience taking a technical product from 0-to-1 (the resolution system, Resso) and your data-driven approach to surfacing patterns (over-enforcement analysis) align perfectly with payments risk product management. The 2.3% revenue uplift from fixing enforcement errors demonstrates you understand the business cost of getting risk wrong.
how_to_win: This is your strongest story-to-role match. Lead aggressively with the SMB over-enforcement case — frame it explicitly as a 'risk product' story: false positive detection, user journey mapping for appeals, building an agentic resolution system, policy influence, and measurable revenue impact. Draw the direct parallel to payments risk: over-enforcement in payments = blocking legitimate transactions = revenue loss. Prepare a framework for how you'd approach payments risk in India's UPI ecosystem. The 0-to-1 requirement is met by both Resso and the enforcement resolution system.
key_requirements: 3+ years product management or related technical role. 1+ year taking technical products from 0 to 1. Bachelor's degree.

title: Product Manager, eWallets
location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India / Hyderabad, Telangana, India
role_summary: Lead product strategy and execution for Google's eWallet products, taking digital wallet features from conception to launch for users across markets.
why_good_fit: Your 7+ years of product experience with 0-to-1 building (Resso founding team, travel startup), deep understanding of Indian consumer payment behaviour (SMB research, WhatsApp-based transactions), and cross-functional execution across engineering, data, and policy teams align well. Your insight that Indian SMBs conduct business through voice-led WhatsApp operations reveals a deep understanding of how money moves in India's informal economy — directly relevant to eWallet product design.
how_to_win: Frame your candidacy around your unique understanding of how Indian users — especially Tier 2/3 consumers and SMBs — actually handle digital money. Lead with the Resso story (0-to-1, scaling to India's largest music streaming app) to demonstrate product execution capability, then layer in your SMB monetisation work to show payments-adjacent experience. Prepare a product vision for how eWallets could better serve India's underbanked and informal business segments. Highlight your 0-to-1 experience explicitly as it's a stated requirement.
key_requirements: 5+ years product management or related technical role. 2+ years taking technical products from 0 to 1. Bachelor's degree.

title: Strategic Partner Development Manager, Online Merchants, Google Pay
role_summary: Drive strategic partnerships with online merchants for Google Pay, working with C-level executives to expand Google Pay's merchant ecosystem across e-commerce, retail, and digital commerce industries.
why_good_fit: Your experience working with Indian SMBs and businesses at Meta (10M+ businesses impacted), cross-functional stakeholder management across product/policy/engineering teams, and deep understanding of Indian commerce behaviour (Shoppertainment, SMB advertiser conversion) provide relevant foundations. Your work influencing senior leadership (CPO-level at Meta) demonstrates executive stakeholder management capability.
how_to_win: Position your SMB and merchant ecosystem experience as partnership-relevant: you understand what Indian merchants need because you've observed them on the ground. Lead with the Shoppertainment work (commerce + creator convergence) and SMB monetisation as evidence of merchant ecosystem thinking. Be prepared to address the gap in formal business development/partnerships experience by emphasizing your consultative, insight-driven approach to stakeholder influence. Prepare examples of how you've managed complex cross-functional relationships that mirror partnership management.
key_requirements: 7+ years in business development, partnerships, management consulting, or investment banking in tech/commerce industries. C-level executive engagement experience. Partnership management experience. Bachelor's degree.

title: Senior Associate, Go-to-Market Business Strategy and Operations
role_summary: Drive go-to-market strategy and sales operations for Google's business, combining strategic analysis with operational execution to optimize how Google takes products to market.
why_good_fit: Your experience building go-to-market strategies for Indian markets (Resso's Tier 2/3 India launch, MetaAI India growth strategy, Shoppertainment monetisation), competitive intelligence work, and cross-functional execution across product/marketing/sales teams align with GTM strategy. Your Half Planning methodology at Meta mirrors the strategic planning cadence this role likely requires.
how_to_win: Lead with your Resso GTM story — how you helped take a music streaming product to market in India by targeting an underserved segment (Tier 2/3 users) that global competitors ignored, ultimately surpassing Spotify. Frame your Meta work as GTM strategy: identifying market opportunities (Shoppertainment), sizing them, building business cases, and securing cross-functional execution. Prepare a POV on how Google could improve its GTM approach for AI products in India.
key_requirements: 4+ years in GTM strategy, sales operations, management consulting, finance, or program management. Bachelor's degree.

title: Core GTM Product Specialist Manager, Google Play
role_summary: Lead go-to-market product strategy for Google Play, managing a team of specialists working with developers and content partners in the e-commerce, gaming, or digital content ecosystem.
why_good_fit: Your experience in digital content ecosystems (Resso music streaming, TikTok content/creator platform), go-to-market strategy for Indian markets, and cross-functional product leadership provide relevant foundations. Your understanding of creator monetisation (TikTok research, Shoppertainment) and content discovery (Resso editorial curation, 10%/90% content insight) maps to Google Play's content and commerce ecosystem. However, the 10-year experience requirement and e-commerce/gaming industry specificity are gaps.
how_to_win: Position your Resso and TikTok experience as directly relevant digital content platform work. Lead with the Resso story — scaling a digital content platform in India, understanding content discovery and recommendation, and driving user growth. Highlight your creator monetisation research at TikTok as evidence of understanding the developer/creator ecosystem. Prepare a perspective on how Google Play can better serve Indian developers and content creators. Address the seniority gap by emphasizing the breadth and impact of your work (CPO-level influence, 2.3% revenue uplift).
key_requirements: 10+ years in product management, customer-facing technical consulting, or similar in online commerce/content. E-commerce, gaming, or digital content industry experience. Bachelor's degree.

title: Process Excellence Lead
role_summary: Lead process transformation and operational excellence initiatives at Google, leveraging AI-driven and agentic automation solutions to re-engineer legacy workflows into next-generation, tech-first processes.
why_good_fit: Your personal AI operating system built on Metamate (80% task automation, top 5% user globally) is a direct demonstration of the AI-driven process transformation this role demands. Your experience building the agentic resolution system for SMB enforcement at Meta shows you can design and advocate for AI-powered workflow solutions. Your experience with end-to-end workflow re-engineering (mapping the SMB appeal journey, identifying broken email-based processes, proposing and influencing the creation of an agentic system) directly maps to the service blueprint and process mapping requirements.
how_to_win: This is an unconventional but potentially strong fit. Lead with two stories: (1) Your Metamate AI OS — how you identified low-ROI tasks, designed agentic automations, and achieved 80% task automation as a proof of concept for AI-driven process excellence; (2) The SMB enforcement resolution system — how you mapped a broken legacy workflow (email appeals), identified the failure points, and influenced the creation of an agentic AI solution. Frame yourself as someone who doesn't just talk about AI automation but has built and lived it. Address the process engineering/program management gap by emphasizing your structured methodology (Half Planning, milestone tracking, execution partnership).
key_requirements: 5+ years program/project management. 5+ years process engineering, business transformation, or AI/automation strategy. Experience proposing AI-driven/agentic automation solutions. End-to-end workflow re-engineering experience with service blueprints and process mapping. Bachelor's degree.

title: Strategic Partnerships Development Manager, Frontier and Applied AI
location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India / Gurugram, Haryana, India
role_summary: Drive strategic partnerships for Google's frontier and applied AI initiatives, working with C-level executives across consumer electronics, telecom, e-commerce, and technology industries to expand Google's AI ecosystem.
why_good_fit: This role sits at the intersection of AI and partnerships — two areas where you have growing strength. Your AI fluency (top 5% Metamate user, personal AI OS, deep understanding of AI product landscape), competitive intelligence work (daily monitoring, TikTok re-entry strategy), and experience influencing senior leadership (CPO-level at Meta) provide relevant foundations. Your understanding of how AI products land in India (MetaAI field work, 20+ user interviews, language-as-growth-lever insight) is uniquely valuable for AI partnership development in India.
how_to_win: Position yourself as someone who understands both the AI product landscape AND the Indian market — a rare combination for partnership roles. Lead with your MetaAI India growth work and the insight about language preferences driving AI product adoption. Highlight your competitive intelligence capability (daily monitoring of AI competitors, TikTok re-entry strategy). Address the business development experience gap by framing your cross-functional stakeholder management and pitching work at Meta as partnership-adjacent skills. Prepare a POV on which Indian industry verticals are most ripe for Google AI partnerships and why.
key_requirements: 10+ years in business development, partnerships, management consulting, or investment banking in tech industries. C-level executive engagement. Partnership/agreement management experience. Bachelor's degree.

title: Startup and Venture Capital Partnership Manager
role_summary: Manage strategic partnerships with startups and venture capital firms to drive Google Cloud and AI adoption, working with C-level executives across the startup ecosystem.
why_good_fit: Your startup founder experience (travel tech, 2022-2024), deep understanding of the Indian startup ecosystem, entrepreneurial mindset, and AI fluency provide a unique perspective for this role. Your experience at both ByteDance (startup-to-scale journey) and Meta (large platform) gives you credibility across the startup lifecycle. Your Zero to One philosophy and long-term vision of building multiple businesses signal genuine startup ecosystem affinity.
how_to_win: Lead with your dual perspective — you've been a startup founder AND a product leader at two of the world's largest tech companies. Frame your travel startup experience as giving you empathy for what startups actually need from cloud/AI platforms. Highlight your AI fluency and personal AI OS as evidence you understand the AI tools startups are building with. Address the formal BD/partnerships experience gap by emphasizing your cross-functional influence skills and stakeholder management at Meta. Prepare specific ideas on how Google Cloud can better serve Indian AI startups.
key_requirements: 10+ years in business development, partnerships, management consulting, or investment banking in tech industries. C-level executive engagement. Partnership management experience. Bachelor's degree.
